violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (multiple slicers, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took items out of service. PIC to demonstrate to staff proper cleaning/sanitizing procedures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the 4 door unit have an accumulation of food residue and miscellaneous debris. Shelving to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine, onion slicer, and scoop) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm, food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Onion slicer and scoop were cleaned during time of inspection. Ice machine was taken out of service at time of inspection and must not be used until it is cleaned. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the utensil rack have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023

The floors in the kitchen and under bar have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023

The floor drains in the bar area have an accumulation of biofilm, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
